<!-- auto-generated by auto-changeset workflow -->
---
"@bike4mind/services": minor
---

make delegate_to_agent cost and credits cache-aware (#151)

Threads the subagent's cache-read / cache-write tokens into `getTextModelCost` at
both the usage-event cost path and the orchestrator credit fallback. The usage-event
`costUsd` now sits on the same cache-aware basis as the credits next to it.

Customer-billing note: the orchestrator credit fallback is the path that actually
populates `totalCredits` for delegations (the ReActAgent `creditsUsed` callback is
empty on this path), and that number flows into what the customer is charged. Making
it cache-aware raises the charge for multi-iteration delegations on cache-enabled
models (Anthropic/Claude) by roughly +36% on affected rows. This is an intended
correction, not a new surcharge: the main `cliCompletions` path already charges
cache-aware, so this brings delegations onto the same basis rather than continuing to
under-charge them.
